text:
DSBLTY_DFCLTY_ERNDS_IND_10 

DSBLTY_DFCLTY_ERNDS_IND_11 

DSBLTY_DFCLTY_ERNDS_IND_12 

LABEL: Disability Indicator — Difficulty Running Errands Alone ― January–December (01–12) 

DESCRIPTION: A monthly flag to indicate whether the beneficiary is 15 years old or older and has difficulty doing 
errands alone such as visiting a doctor’s office or shopping because of a physical, mental, or emotional 
condition in the month. There are separate variables for each of the 12 months during the year.
